title: Sub Item Formula won't let me reference Parent Qty
excerpt: The formula column won’t let me reference the QTY column from the parent item. This is crucial to my workflow. Does anyone have a solution? Please see picture.

posts.author: joe.morgans (Joseph Morgans)
posts.cookedHtml:
The formula column won’t let me reference the QTY column from the parent item. This is crucial to my workflow. Does anyone have a solution? Please see picture.

image1310×463 38.5 KB

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @joe.morgans - this is not supported at this time. As a workaround, you could use Autoboost to copy the parent value to the subitem on creation, then it will be available in your formula.

Hope this helps!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: joe.morgans (Joseph Morgans)
posts.cookedHtml: That looks like a perfect solution! Will look into it

posts.author: Marius.Manic (Marius)
posts.cookedHtml: You might use a subitem Mirror column for the item QTY.

posts.author: joe.morgans (Joseph Morgans)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just tried the app and it’s worked perfect. I used two integrations, see below.

image1276×263 29.4 KB

Thanks or your help!

posts.author: joe.morgans (Joseph Morgans)
posts.cookedHtml: Then I could add the subitem called Qty in my formula, thanks!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Glad we could help @joe.morgans !
Mark
